class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>吧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>东<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>争<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>战<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhàn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>东<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>最<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>小<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>藐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>视<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shān</rt></ruby><ruby>穴<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xué</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>居<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jū</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>狂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>傲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ào</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>欺<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>谁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shuí</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>拉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lā</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qù</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ne</rt></ruby>？’

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>虽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suī</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>鹰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>飞<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fēi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>星<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>宿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiù</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>搭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dā</rt></ruby><ruby>窝<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>拉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lā</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>。<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

“<ruby>盗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dào</rt></ruby><ruby>贼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zéi</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>或<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>强<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>盗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>夜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yè</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>（<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>何<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>竟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>剪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>除<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chú</rt></ruby>），<ruby>岂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>偷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tōu</rt></ruby><ruby>窃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>直<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhí</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>够<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡòu</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ne</rt></ruby>？<ruby>摘<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhāi</rt></ruby><ruby>葡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>萄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>岂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>剩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>些<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiē</rt></ruby><ruby>葡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>萄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ne</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>隐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐn</rt></ruby><ruby>密<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mì</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chù</rt></ruby><ruby>何<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>竟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>搜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sōu</rt></ruby><ruby>寻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xún</rt></ruby>？<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>隐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐn</rt></ruby><ruby>藏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>宝<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>何<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>竟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>查<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chá</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>结<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>盟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ménɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>送<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>直<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhí</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>交<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiāo</rt></ruby><ruby>界<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiè</rt></ruby>；<ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>好<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>欺<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>骗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>；<ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>吃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chī</rt></ruby><ruby>饭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>设<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shè</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>网<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>陷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>害<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>；<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>毫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">háo</rt></ruby><ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wú</rt></ruby><ruby>聪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：<ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>岂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>东<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>除<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chú</rt></ruby><ruby>灭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miè</rt></ruby><ruby>智<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>慧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>、<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shān</rt></ruby><ruby>除<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chú</rt></ruby><ruby>灭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miè</rt></ruby><ruby>聪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>提<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tí</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">幔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">màn</rt></ruby><ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǎ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>勇<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>士<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>惊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>惶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>甚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shèn</rt></ruby><ruby>至<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shān</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby><ruby>戮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>剪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>除<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chú</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>东<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">dōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zuì</rt></ruby>

“<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">di</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>强<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>暴<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bào</rt></ruby>，<ruby>羞<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiū</rt></ruby><ruby>愧<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuì</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>遮<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhē</rt></ruby><ruby>盖<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>永<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>断<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duàn</rt></ruby><ruby>绝<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jué</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wài</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>掳<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>掠<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lüè</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>财<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cái</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wài</rt></ruby><ruby>邦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>入<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rù</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>城<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>冷<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>拈<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">niān</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">阄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>竟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>站<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>旁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">pánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>伙<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huǒ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Bì</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>拯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>救<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhě</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>锡<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ān</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>审<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shěn</rt></ruby><ruby>判<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">pàn</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shān</rt></ruby>；<ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>度<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dù</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>。”
